narrative_seed_by_week.4: Foundation models — trained once at scale, usable for many tasks / Fine-tuning — adapting a model on smaller domain-specific data / RAG — giving AI access to external knowledge at query time (introduced here; full session in Week 14) / Agents — LLM + memory + tools + planning loop (introduced conceptually; agent design in Week 14; full build in Year 2) / Tool use — AI calling search, calculator, code runner / Multimodal AI — text, image, audio, video in one system

lab_activity_seed_by_week.4: Live demo — same question with and without RAG, accuracy compared / Each student independently designs a 5-criteria evaluation rubric to compare two AI tools / Present findings — defend with evidence, not opinion
